analysis: The project appears to be a website with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs) and the current focus is on the 'blackholes' topic with a theme involving animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing to-dos indicate incomplete CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files related to a cosmic/black hole theme. The CSS files need completion with dark cosmic themes, animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML files need completion with sections related to black holes and mobile-friendly navigation. The JavaScript files need completion with proper functionality and event handlers.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including fixing syntax errors in the showSlide function and adding event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
